'''Tuzin Gast''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] researcher for [[Binring Biomedical Product]].

==Biography==
Gast was the principal scientist involved in [[Project Chubar]], a research effort commissioned by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to provide intelligent and loyal nonhuman spies through [[Gene therapy|genetic]] and chemical therapies.

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Gast assisted [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] in acquiring a majority stake in Binring Biomedical. Shortly thereafter, he suffered a breakdown due to the guilt he felt from his unethical research.

Gast allowed [[Voort saBinring]], one of his most successful subjects, to escape, and then used an explosive device to commit suicide and destroy much of his research facility on [[Saffalore]]. Before setting off the explosive, he synthesized enough [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] blood plasma to make it appear that saBinring had [[Death/Legends|died]] in the blast with the other test subjects. Gast's head was found among the debris.

Tuzin Gast was survived by his niece, [[Edda Gast]], who resumed his research with little difficulty.
